subtitle: A 200-meter cove that exists to look at one thing: Es Vedrà, the 413-meter limestone islet 2.5 km offshore.

levers.photo_tone: warm low sun, dark silhouetted rock, amber-to-violet sky over water

spike_statement: The cove is small and ordinary; what makes it famous stands 2.5 km offshore: Es Vedrà, 413 m of bare limestone that the sunset turns to silhouette.
